425Appears inJonny Quest Versus the Cyber Insects(1995)Portrayed byRob PaulsenGenderMaleOccupationZin's henchmanFateStatusPresumed deceased425(spoken as Four-Twenty-Five) is one of the henchman ofDr. Zinwhen Zin took overQuest Station. A redheaded Caucasian man in a green uniform. No. 425 was the designation of a redheaded man who served as project leader aboardDr. Zin's asteroid base. He was tasked with preventingDr. Questfrom reaching space by sending Zin'sFormicoidsto stop them. When they failed, 425 was blamed. He was seized and taken away byHymenoptoids. He was replaced byNo. 426.

425Appears inJonny Quest Versus the Cyber Insects(1995)Portrayed byRob PaulsenGenderMaleOccupationZin's henchmanFateStatusPresumed deceased425(spoken as Four-Twenty-Five) is one of the henchman ofDr. Zinwhen Zin took overQuest Station. 426Appears inJonny Quest Versus the Cyber Insects(1995)Portrayed byOlivia WhiteGenderFemaleOccupationZin's henchmanFateStatusPresumed deceased426(spoken as Four-Twenty-Six) is the henchwoman ofDr. Zinwhen Zin took overQuest Station. An older blonde Caucasian woman in a green uniform. No. 426 was the designation of a female technician who served aboardDr. Zin's asteroid base. AfterNo. 425was demoted for failure and carried away by Zin'sHymenoptoids, 426 was promoted into his place. She performed her tasks well including infecting4-DACwith a computer virus, bringing it under Zin's command. However when she spoke out against Zin and stopped him from firing on the shuttle carryingRace Bannon,Jonny Quest, Hadji andJessie, for fear that it would alertIntelligence Oneto the cloaked asteroid's position, an enraged Zin sentenced 426 to become a test subject in his experiments, and she was dropped through a trapdoor.

characters.name: Abby
characters.description: AbbyAppears inThe Real Adventures of Jonny QuestEpisode debut1.09Ezekiel RagePortrayed byDarlene CarrGenderFemaleFamilyEzekiel Rage(husband)Karla† (daughter)FateStatusDeceasedCause of deathCar crashAbbywas the wife of renegade American government agentEzekiel Rage, and the mother of their daughterKarla. Abby was wed to Ezekiel and believed him to be a worldwide computer salesman, though he was actually a secret government agent. At some point the couple had a daughter named Karla. During one of Ezekiel's "business trips" in Panagua, Abby and Karla flew in from Miami to surprise him. However, the country's government was in pursuit of Ezekiel, which resulted in the country's army chasing after them. Ezekiel fled with Abby and Karla in a car. Abby was none too pleased that Ezekiel had been lying to her about his real job the whole time, but he protested that he was just waiting for the right time to tell her.

characters.name: Aku
characters.description: AkuAppears inJonny Quest(1964 TV series)Episode debut1.15Turu the TerribleGenderMaleFamilyNuago(brother)FateStatusAlive Akuis a local whereTuruis kidnapping people in South America. While Aku is canoeing with his brotherNuago, Turu grabs Nuago and carries him off. Aku tells them Quest team what he saw. Aku has brown skin, black hair, and dark eyes. He wears a yellow and turquoise bandanna wrap around his head, a necklace, and a brown cloth around his waist.

characters.name: Alvero
characters.description: AlveroAppears inJonny Quest(1964 TV series)Episode debut1.12The Dreadful DollGenderMaleOccupationForemanAlverois the foreman ofPhilippe Lore. He has light brownish skin, black hair, and black eyes.  He wears a tan hat, and blue jacket and shirt.  He is also clearly a Latino. He's a reliable foreman who cares enough about Denise Lore to get help for her when she's drugged by Korbay.  He also has a tough side, demonstrated when he knocks out a distracted Harden. characters.name: Amok(creature)
characters.description: AmokAppears inThe Real Adventures of Jonny Quest(1996 TV series)Episode debut1.15AmokPortrayed byFrank Welker Amokis a bigfoot-like creature. The Amok's physical appearance is somewhat like bigfoot: a large, furry, bipedal creature. It has claws akin to a sloth, with red eyes and large teeth reminiscent of ancient depictions of a dragon or demon.

In the 20th century, his mummy awakened to exact his vengeance onDr. Ahmed Kareem. He looks like a regular mummy would, wrapped up in bandages.

characters.name: Arnaud
characters.description: ArnaudAppears inThe Real Adventures of Jonny Quest(1996 TV series)Episode debut212EclipsePortrayed byMichael CarvenGenderMaleFamilyCeleste(sister) Arnaudis an elderly man fromNew Orleans. When he was fifty years younger, he was seduced by the succubus/vampireElise Lenoir, during a lunar eclipse, the time in which she was allowed to drain another young human being to maintain her own youth and immortality, forcing him to give up hisonly sisterto her. For the next fifty years, he began a hunting campaign against her, hiring agents to track her down, while she hypnotized others into serving her. He eventually got to avenge his sister with help fromJonny Quest,Hadji Singh(another love interest), andJessie Bannon, who was her next target to drain. However, the river she had been sent to the bottom of to die, only briefly stopped her, as unknown to all, she began to rise to the surface.

characters.name: Arnaud

characters.name: Gustavo Arollo
characters.description: Gustavo ArolloAppears inThe Real Adventures of Jonny QuestEpisode debut1.23Ice Will BurnPortrayed byChick VenneraGenderMaleOccupationPilotFateStatusDeceasedCause of deathWhen the Quest Jet fell through ice into a ravine Gustavo Arollois a pilot who fliesJessie BannonfromMaineto NortheasternSiberiain theQuest Jet. Gustavo is an adult man with blue eyes and fair skin. He has long brown hair that he wears in a low ponytail. He wears a white long-sleeve dress shirt, a black tie, and black suspenders. Gustavo is friendly and welcomes Jessie as his co-pilot. He is level-headed in a crisis, keeping calm when both engines go out on the Quest Jet and successfully doing an emergency landing with no engines.
characters.personality_section: Gustavo is friendly and welcomes Jessie as his co-pilot. He is level-headed in a crisis, keeping calm when both engines go out on the Quest Jet and successfully doing an emergency landing with no engines.

characters.name: Dr. Ashida
characters.description: Dr. AshidaAppears inJonny Quest(1964 TV series)Episode debut1.14Dragons of AshidaPortrayed byHenry CordenGenderMaleOccupationZoologistTitlesDoctorRelationshipsSumi(henchman)Himoki(servant)FateStatusDeceasedDiedAshida islandCause of deathEaten alive byhis dragonsafterSumithrew him into the dragon pitDr. Ashidawas a zoologist specializing in breeding/genetically altering Tobura lizards intogiant-sized dragon-like versionsof themselves. A balding Asian man in a blue robe. Dr. Ashida was a Japanese zoologist who lived on his own island,Ashida. Dr. Ashida's life-long goal was to save theTobora lizardfrom extinction, and he did so by experimenting upon the few Toboras left, genetically modifying them into 14-foot monsters which he, for the same egotistical reasons he named the island after himself, dubbed theAshida dragons.

characters.name: Bandit
characters.description: BanditBandit in the 1964 TV seriesAppears inJonny Quest(1964 TV series)Jonny Quest(1986 TV series)Most related mediaEpisode debut1.01The Mystery of the Lizard MenPortrayed byDon Messick(1964, 1986)GenderMaleFamilyJonny Quest(owner) Banditis the pet bulldog of the Quests, and a valued member of their team. He's actually more of a cross between a Pug and Bulldog, with white fur and a distinctive black mask-like patch around his eyes, hence his name. He acts brave in front of his family, but is really just a front and cowers in any real danger.
characters.personality_section: He acts brave in front of his family, but is really just a front and cowers in any real danger.

characters.name: Bandit(telefilms)
characters.description: BanditAppears inJonny's Golden Quest(1993)Jonny Quest Versus the Cyber Insects(1995)Portrayed byDon MessickGenderMaleFamilyJonny Quest(owner)FateStatusAlive Banditis the Quest team's pet dog and he accompanies them on their adventures. Bandit is a small bulldog with mostly white fur, with black fur around his eyes in the shape of a mask. He wears a red collar with gold studs. Bandit is friendly with his family. He can make friends easily, and he quickly warms toJessie. Bandit can be quick to growl and attack others though. He will growl and attack anyone or anything that threatens his family, and he attacks Zin'sreplicantsseveral times. He chase after random animals, like cats. Bandit also has a six-year rivalry with3-DAC, even though she isDr. Quest's invention. He regularly growls at her, and he bites her cord which causes her to malfunction.

characters.name: Bandit(The Real Adventures)
characters.description: BanditSeason 1Season 2Appears inThe Real Adventures of Jonny QuestEpisode debut1.03In the Realm of the CondorPortrayed byFrank WelkerGenderMaleFamilyJonny Quest(owner)FateStatusAlive (immortal)Banditis a character inThe Real Adventures of Jonny Quest. He isJonny's pet dog, and Jonny occasionally takes him along on their trips. Bandit is very similar to hisoriginal continuity character. This version of Bandit is notably immortal after drinking from the river of life. Bandit is a bulldog. His fur his primarily white, with a black mask-like coloration around his eyes. He wears a red collar with a golden tag.

characters.name: Race Bannon
characters.description: Race BannonAppears inJonny Quest(1964 TV series)Jonny Quest(1986 TV series)Episode debut1.01The Mystery of the Lizard MenPortrayed byMike Road(1964)Sonny Van Dusen(1986)GenderMaleAge32 (1964 series)[1]NicknamesRaceOccupationBodyguardAgent of Intelligence OneBornRoger T. Bannonc. 1936Wilmette, Illinois, USA[1]Roger T. "Race" Bannonis the bodyguard of the Quest team. His official role is to be a watchdog/tutor onJonny. He usually often ends up assistingDr. Benton Queston his dangerous missions, though he will be still be there if Hadji or Jonny find themselves in peril. Race is a above-average athletic man with white hair. Race knows how to stay patient and composed for the greater good. Race knows how to stay patient and composed for the greater good.
characters.personality_section: Race knows how to stay patient and composed for the greater good.
